title: Gold Miners or Silver Miners: Which Precious Metals ETF Is the Better Buy Right Now?
author: Sara Appino
description: The article compares two precious metals mining ETFs: Sprott Gold Miners ETF (SGDM), which focuses on North American gold producers with a lower 0.46% expense ratio, and Global X Silver Miners ETF (SIL), which provides global silver exposure with higher 1-year returns (83% vs 53%) but greater volatility. Gold miners are recommended for new precious metals investors, while silver miners suit those seeking higher-conviction bets on industrial and monetary demand convergence.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Lower expense ratio (0.46%), more stable with lower beta (0.53) and maximum drawdown (45%), better 5-year growth ($2,214 from $1,000), and recommended as the more established entry point for new precious metals investors.

Higher 1-year returns (83%), higher dividend yield (1.10%), and positioned as a higher-conviction bet for investors with existing precious metals exposure seeking exposure to industrial demand and green transition themes.
Listed as a top holding (8.48%) in SGDM with no specific performance commentary provided in the article.
Listed as the largest holding (21.52%) in SIL with no specific performance commentary provided in the article.
Listed as a top holding (12.66%) in SIL with no specific performance commentary provided in the article.
Listed as a top holding (11.04%) in SIL with no specific performance commentary provided in the article.
Listed as a top holding (10.46%) in SGDM with no specific performance commentary provided in the article.

title: Cassiar District Polymetallic System Funded For 2026 Drilling Inside Tightening Silver Market
author: Equity Insider
description: GoldHaven Resources Corp. has secured approximately C$8.2 million in funding (C$3.2 million flow-through plus C$5.0 million LIFE Offering) to advance its 37,204-hectare Magno Project in British Columbia's Cassiar District. The company plans a 1,741 line-km airborne magnetic survey in June 2026 and an expanded drill program targeting three priority zones with high-grade silver-lead-zinc-tungsten mineralization. The funding positions GoldHaven to capitalize on the current silver market repricing and institutional demand for polymetallic exposure.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Used as an institutional-scale producer comparable to contextualize the potential of GoldHaven's polymetallic system; no specific company news or developments mentioned.
Used as a producer-end comparable framework for multi-asset polymetallic operations; no specific company news or developments mentioned.
Referenced as the most directly geologically analogous comparable for silver-lead-zinc mineralization; represents institutional valuation framework but no specific company developments discussed.

title: Gold Candle fera l’acquisition du gisement de Larder de Pan American Silver et renforcera ainsi sa présence en Abitibi
author: Na
description: Gold Candle Ltd. has agreed to acquire Pan American Silver's Larder gold deposit in Abitibi for 15 million shares, adding 388,000 ounces of indicated gold resources and 933,000 ounces of inferred resources. The acquisition expands Gold Candle's land package to over 27,000 hectares along the Cadillac-Larder Lake fault and is expected to close in Q3 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Pan American is divesting the Larder property and receiving 15 million Gold Candle shares (approximately 6% ownership on a pro forma basis). While this represents a strategic exit, the transaction terms and long-term value are not clearly detailed, warranting a neutral assessment.

title: Fredonia Expands El Dorado–Monserrat District to ~33,500 Hectares, Consolidating a Continuous Gold-Silver Corridor Adjacent to Cerro Vanguardia
author: Na
description: Fredonia Mining Inc. has completed the acquisition of approximately 11,754 hectares of mineral properties from a Pan American Silver subsidiary in Argentina's Deseado Massif region. The acquisition expands Fredonia's consolidated land position by over 50% to ~33,500 hectares, connecting previously fragmented northern and southern mineralized corridors into a unified district-scale system adjacent to AngloGold Ashanti's Cerro Vanguardia mine. The company is advancing a Preliminary Economic Assessment and 10,000-metre drill program on its flagship EDM project, which hosts a measured and indicated mineral resource of approximately 2.25 million ounces of gold equivalent.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Pan American Silver divested non-core properties to Fredonia. While this represents a strategic portfolio optimization, the transaction itself is relatively minor and does not directly impact the company's core operations or financial position materially.
AngloGold Ashanti is mentioned only as context regarding the nearby Cerro Vanguardia mine. The article does not contain information directly affecting AngloGold's operations or financial performance.

title: The Great Give Back brings community together in support of Royal Columbian Hospital
author: Na
description: Royal Columbian Hospital Foundation is hosting The Great Give Back on March 14, 2026, a free community celebration at Queen's Park Sportsplex to recognize donor support for the upcoming Jim Pattison Acute Care Tower. The event features live entertainment, family activities, healthcare career fair, and food vendors, with attendees' photos to be featured in an art installation within the new tower.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Pan American Silver is mentioned as a presenter/sponsor of the event, indicating corporate community involvement and brand association with healthcare philanthropy. However, this is a sponsorship announcement with no material business impact disclosed.
